text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And so I told the secretary, "Time's up, show me
the minutes."

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text: Ohh, that's a good one! An impressive joke, coming from the prez!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Aha, a rival steps into the ring.

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
Well, jokes—or more like puns—are kinda my
thing too.

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
Where I'm from, instead of "hello," the
neighborhood uncles greet you with a pun. You
develop a taste for it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, the puns you teach me are the cream of
the comedic crop, veritable gems. Mine don't
even begin to compare.

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
It's all a matter of experience. I tell ya, thirty or
forty percent of what comes out of their mouths is
puns.

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
They'll be out in the fields like, "Blue jeans? Nah,
I'm aubergines!" or "I'm rootin' for ya!" and "Weed
love to!"

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Huh, interesting. Hey Rudolf, why don't you take
inspiration from what you know? Like,
race-related things!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm... It pays off to keep pace with one's competition. I was taking a cold drink before the race, but when I saw who my opponents were, I gulped.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I think I'm starting to get the hang of this... Right,
I'll keep looking for inspiration in the things
around me. Perhaps one day, I'll match you in
experience.
